children.title: Measure Units
children.note: Measure Units. Toggles: 'C-kg/hr' and 'F-lb/h'. Affects: A,1,R (demand) A,10,R (production) A,19,R/W (temperature setpoint)

children.title: Override conductivity reading
children._comment: Limitation: Modbus writes to I,138 are acknowledged but the controller reloads the previous value. (but when committed via the keypad/display this value can be modified).

children.title: Reg. from BMS
children.raw_text: Reg. from BMS (D,80,R/W) [Yes/No] Note: Enabling control supervisor

children.title: Fill valve
children.raw_text: Fill valve (D,54,R/W) [off,on] referenced as "cleaning cycle" in the manual

children.title: Lifetime counter
children.raw_text: Lifetime counter (D,49,R/W) [yes,no] Note: cylinder 1: reset of the hour counter
children.note: cylinder 1: reset of the hour counter

children.title: Flush new cylinder
children.raw_text: Flush new cylinder (D,54,R/W) [yes,no] Note: AKA: 'Fill valve' and 'cleaning cycle'

children.title: Date / time
children.raw_text: Date / time (same value as the main dashboard clock)
children.note: Sourced from the main dashboard clock display.
